releases.description:
Disable the noisy sentence-case lint rule instead of maintaining per-rule exception lists

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/davidvkimball/obsidian-ui-tweaker/compare/0.4.2...0.4.3

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Drop the inline sourcemap from production builds for reproducibility

An inline sourcemap base64-embeds the build machine's absolute file
paths into main.js, so a CI build and the Obsidian scorecard's
reproducer produce byte-different output and the "build verification"
check fails even from identical source.

Gate the sourcemap on build mode: production (pnpm build) now ships
`sourcemap: false`, while the dev/watch build keeps `sourcemap:
"inline"` for local debugging. Production main.js is now deterministic
given the locked dependency tree, so the reproducer matches. Bonus:
smaller shipped main.js, no leaked build paths.

Bump to 0.4.2.

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/davidvkimball/obsidian-ui-tweaker/compare/0.4.1...0.4.2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Apply the same synchronous collapse-state fix to the Tab bar tab

Same `setTimeout(0)` flicker pattern as the Explorer tab had: the
"collapse subsections" pass at the tail of the item renderer ran on
the next macrotask, so the rebuild painted every group fully expanded
for a frame before snapping closed. Apply the saved collapse state
synchronously instead. StatusBarTab doesn't have this pattern, so
that one is already fine.

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/davidvkimball/obsidian-ui-tweaker/compare/0.4.0...0.4.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Scorecard cleanup pass for 0.4.0

- Replace bare `document`, `setTimeout`, and `clearTimeout` references with
  `activeDocument` and `window.*` for popout-window compatibility.
- Swap `instanceof HTMLElement` for the cross-window `.instanceOf` form and
  `document.createElement('div')` for the Obsidian `createDiv` helper.
- Type the private Obsidian APIs we touch (`metadataTypeManager`,
  `view.refresh`, `view.metadataEditor`, menu sections) behind small `*Like`
  interfaces so the no-unsafe-* rules don't fire at every access site.
- Drop unused imports (Editor, MarkdownView, MarkdownFileInfo,
  PropertyIconItem) and prefix intentionally-unused params with `_`.
- Make MenuManager's Proxy use arrow-function `apply` instead of the
  `const manager = this` alias, and re-type the proxied call so the unsafe
  return is gone.
- Rewrap the command-callback proxies in main.ts to drop the unused `any`
  return for `callback` / `editorCallback`, and explicitly type the
  `checkCallback` / `editorCheckCallback` return as `boolean | void`.
- Convert the `IconPickerModal` close handlers in PropertiesManager and
  PropertiesTab from `async` callbacks to fire-and-forget IIFEs so we
  don't return a Promise where the modal expects void.
- Drop redundant `async` from three `renderResetButton` call sites that
  had no `await` body.
- Rephrase the "checkCallback" tooltip text across ExplorerTab,
  TabBarTab, and PropertiesTab so the obsidianmd/ui/sentence-case rule
  doesn't mis-case it.
- Remove all 134 `!important` declarations from styles.css. Most of the
  affected rules already have body-class or two-class specificity that
  wins against Obsidian's defaults on cascade alone; for the two utility
  classes that don't (`.ui-tweaker-status-bar-hidden`,
  `.ui-tweaker-explorer-button-hidden`), use the doubled-class
  specificity trick.
- Delete the duplicate `.ui-tweaker-status-bar-hidden` block that was
  flagged for "Unexpected duplicate selector".
- Add `pnpm.overrides` for the minimatch / picomatch / brace-expansion /
  ajv / flatted / yaml chain pulled in transitively by eslint and the
  obsidianmd plugin.
- Upgrade `eslint-plugin-obsidianmd` 0.1.9 -> 0.3.0 and scope its
  recommended config to TypeScript files only so the type-aware rules
  don't choke on `.mjs` files.
- Drop the broken `preinstall` script and fill in the package author.
- Add a portable CONTRIBUTING.md and a Release workflow with build
  provenance attestation, manifest-based version reading, and release
  notes built from the latest commit message.

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/davidvkimball/obsidian-ui-tweaker/compare/0.3.11...0.4.0

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Feat: Status bar can now be hidden on mobile independently from desktop. 

Resolving issue #1.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
### Refactored Help Button Monitor
  - Replaced fragile timeouts with a high-performance, persistent `MutationObserver`.
  - Implemented an "Aggressive Startup" mode (0ms debounce) to ensure the help button is swapped instantly after a restart.
  - Added attribute-specific monitoring to handle theme changes or sidebar toggling seamlessly.
  - Screen doesn't jump when toggling the feature on/off

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Fixed the "sync button" icon swap on mobile. 
Removed unneeded Mobile heading on the mobile settings tab.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: New settings tab top navigation UI.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: New properties settings added. Icons can now be customized for properties.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Major refactor: Extract utilities and improve code organization

- Extracted button replacement logic into reusable ButtonReplacer class
- Moved CSS props helper to dedicated cssUtils.ts
- Created command-logic.ts and settings-migration.ts utilities
- Reduced main.ts by ~600 lines through modularization
- Removed toggle state refresh interval for performance, used smarter detection
- General code cleanup and whitespace normalization across UI managers and settings tabs

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Fixed "sync button" replacement issues. Should be consistent whether or not the Sync core plugin is on or off.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Added de-emphsize properties. Fixed tab bar hiding-related settings.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Custom status bar icons now match the style of the other status bar icons.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Vastly improved status bar organization features.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Removing linting errors.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: More robust status bar IDing and naming for tricker-to-pin-down plugins.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Fixed remembering explorer icon placement and visibility.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Fixed bugs related to preserving the custom button, fixed hiding the status bar, and the reveal logic for the file explorer navigation buttons. Should be more stable.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Implement unified explorer button management with reordering support

- Add unified ExplorerButtonItem interface for native, external, and custom buttons
- Implement reordering with up/down chevron controls for all button types
- Add automatic detection of external plugin buttons (Commander, Explorer Focus, etc.)
- Add hide/show toggle (eyeball icon) for external buttons
- Remove divider between native and non-native buttons in settings
- Add reset buttons for icon colors and icon overrides on native buttons
- Fix flickering by disconnecting mutation observers during DOM updates
- Improve mutation observer to only trigger on new external buttons
- Preserve scroll position during reordering in settings
- Add migration logic to convert existing explorerCommands to unified system

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Fix status bar item identification for dynamic content

- Filter out dynamic state classes when generating canonical names
- Match items by actual DOM position instead of counter that resets
- Improve matching algorithm for multiple items with same canonical name
- Prevent duplicate entries when plugin status bar classes change dynamically
- Handle elements that appear/disappear without losing their identity

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Improve file type filtering and UI polish for Tab Bar, Explorer, and Status Bar

- Replace single fileTypeFilter with separate showOnFileTypes and hideOnFileTypes fields for clearer filtering logic
- Add scroll position preservation to prevent flickering when reordering items in Tab Bar and Explorer tabs
- Disable hover effects on grayed-out move buttons using pointer-events: none
- Style delete buttons with red/warning appearance (mod-warning class and error color) across all managers
- Update icons: use image-plus for add buttons, trash for delete options in context menus
- Fix inline rename functionality by allowing clicks on name display and edit icon elements
- Fix custom status bar items to show trash icon instead of eye icon for deletion
- Fix scroll jumping when resetting toggle icon to default
- Remove rename option from context menus (Tab Bar, Explorer, Status Bar)
- Add migration logic to convert mdOnly and fileTypeFilter to new showOnFileTypes/hideOnFileTypes structure

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
## Version 0.2.0

### Features
- Add Explorer tab with custom command buttons for file explorer navigation area
- Add native explorer button controls (New note, New folder, Sort order, Auto-reveal, Collapse all)
- Add icon override support for native explorer buttons
- Add color customization for native explorer buttons
- Add toggle icon feature for command buttons (sun/moon for theme toggle, etc.)
- Add "use active class" option for explorer buttons (alternative to icon swap)
- Add Status Bar tab with unified management of existing and custom status bar items
- Add Tab Bar tab with custom command buttons for page headers
- Add command execution interceptor for automatic toggle state synchronization
- Add periodic refresh system to keep button states in sync with external command executions

### Improvements
- Add plugin developer compatibility documentation for toggle icon feature
- Optimize settings UI rendering to prevent flickering and scroll jumping
- Improve reset button tooltips to match native Obsidian behavior (aria-label only)

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Scoped settings container to avoid affecting other plugins.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Add Show/Hide/Reveal states for scrollbars. In reveal mode, scrollbars are invisible by default and appear with native Obsidian styling when hovering near the scrollbar area. Preserves all native scrollbar behavior including hover/active states.

releases.author: davidvkimball

Add mobile UI enhancements and OS-aware window dragging
- Add "Hide title" option for mobile view headers
- Add "Hide sync icon" option for mobile interface
- Add "Replace sync button with custom action" feature (mobile only)
- Add OS-aware window dragging when tab bar is hidden (Windows/macOS/neutral)
- Update mobile chevrons description to clarify "long-press flair"
- Change default vault switcher background transparency to 0.98
- Change default command IDs to empty strings for button replacements

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Improve TypeScript type safety and error handling

- Replace `any` types with proper types (settingTab, command execution)
- Add error handling to loadSettings() with try/catch fallback
- Improve type assertions for app.commands and app.setting APIs
- Add documentation comments for intentional deviations from best practices
